name: Deva Prasan V Emmanuel
review: If you’re looking for the best place to learn and experience alpinism, Alpine Ops is the place to be. Trained by professional alpinist instructors, ex-militia; you’ll gain real knowledge, skills, and confidence. Don’t hesitate to join—this is where serious learning begins. A military way of learning.

name: Akash Singh
review: I am a mountaineering and fitness enthusiast, who mostly like to work upon the fitness as a byproduct of mountaineering, climbing and other outdoor activities rather than hitting gym. And Alpine Ops exactly delivers this. I have completed 3 treks till now accompanied by my wife with Alpine Ops. I have opted for Mid difficulty level treks with them which are suitable for family setup. It helped me in connecting with nature, spending quality time with my family, building amazing and like minded friends along the trek, and gaining military like experience from the team Alpine Ops.

name: Anjali
review: I recently completed the 3-day Mahasar Tal trek with Alpine Operations and Expeditions and it was truly unforgettable. The team was very friendly, experienced, and always motivated us throughout the trek. The campsites were beautiful, food was delicious, and safety was clearly their top priority. If you are planning a Himalayan trek, I would definitely recommend going with them. Looking forward to more treks in the future!

name: Avinash Kumar Singh
review: Completely different level of adventure community . They guide , educate and train an adventure enthusiast into a trained mountaineer .

name: Vedansh Joshi
review: I just randomly came across them on social media and joined the MountainPro 2.0, I had a blast there, the instructors were amazing and their team put in a lot of effort too providing us a great experience. We learned a lot of new things, gained knowledge and if you want to learn about mountaineering and alpinism from basic then you should become a part of them. If you are wired differently then this is you place.

name: Prashansa Chauhan
review: Amazing group, full support of trekking experts throughout the journey. They offer delicious food, great camping setup, take care of hygiene. Trekking locations are all together a different experience, super fun treks with beautiful tent setup locations. Recommended for beginners, intermediate and advanced level trekkers/explorers.
